_note: Synthetic GitHub `pull_request` event payload for tests. Hand-authored to represent a SMALL, well-described, genuine first-time contribution (author has zero prior merges). Must NOT be auto-flagged just for being new, and must NOT be auto-exempt either. Not captured from a real PR.

pull_request.title: Correct typo in error message: 'recieved' -> 'received'
pull_request.body:
Spotted a small typo in the connection error path while debugging my own integration. Single-word fix, no behavior change.

Happy to add a test if you'd like one but this is a string-only change.
